name: Landing Page Load
details: Loaded landing page successfully. Title: "Core Scheduler | Multi-Domain Task Manager"

name: Login Page Fields Check
details: Email and Password inputs are fully rendered.

name: Register Page Fields Check
details: Name and Email input fields (Step 1) are fully rendered.

name: Login Form Validation - Missing Email
details: Form prevents submission or prompts for email correctly.

name: Login Form Validation - Missing Password
details: Form validation active; blank password prevented.

name: Login Invalid Credentials Error Message
details: API responded with rejection, preventing session authorization.

name: Register Form Validation - Invalid Email
details: Incorrect email format input blocked by client validation.

name: Auth Protection Redirect - Dashboard
details: Redirected unauthorized user successfully to "/login".

name: Auth Protection Redirect - Invitations
details: Redirected unauthorized user to login for invitations route.

name: Auth Protection Redirect - Profile
details: Redirected unauthorized user to login for profile route.

name: Navigation Link - Login to Register

name: Navigation Link - Register to Login
details: Successfully transitioned from Register back to Login page.

name: Forgot Password Toggle UI Mode

name: Back to Login Toggle UI Mode
details: Successfully toggled back to login view. Button text: "SIGN IN"

name: Forgot Password Validation - Missing Email
